summary: The public Linq CLI must contain only generic Linq commands, docs, and metadata with no private deployment-specific operator workflow.
reason: The public catalog package should be safe to publish and install independently of any private deployment. Removing private command registrations, docs, tests, and provenance prevents accidental discoverability through help, MCP mirroring, agent-context, or patch metadata.
validated_outcome: go test ./... plus branded/private string scan.
